element.key: This book, written with the blood of the Thunder God, enables you to perform a highly powerful top-down strike that lifts you off the ground, allowing you to unleash a devastating attack.

tutorialTexts: Go to the farmer and take a quest
Kill some Roundhead monsters until you find a sword
Open your inventory and equip sword
Go to the Farmer Steve to claim your reward!
Now go the blacksmith and buy armor
Open your pet inventory and take a look at your pet
Now take the next quest and become the strongest warrior!

[color="#FF9900"]2.[/color] If you join a battle your trade stands will be closed.
[color="#FF9900"]3.[/color] If you leave the game, you will lose your items
[color="#FF9900"]4.[/color] Winner team takes other teams items 
[color="#FF9900"]5.[/color] Unexpected bugs might happen and play at your own risk
